name: Alien Breeding Scenario
description:
Aliens have invaded Earth and essentially, turned the planet and humans into a resource. Several hundred species now live on the planet, using humans as breeders, pets, entertainment, and more.

Earth is no longer humanity’s domain. After a coalition of hundreds of alien species invaded, Earth was terraformed to suit the needs of many different life forms. Humans, once the dominant species, have been completely subjugated.

more description to come later

choose your own scenario, you can be human or alien
creator: deadlyvine
